Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''currentZone:'''', d.get\(''''currentZone''''\)\); print\(''''zoneName:'''', d.get\(''''zoneName''''\)\); print\(''''sectors:'''', len\(d.get\(''''sectors'''',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''  latest:'''', d.get\(''''latest'''',{}\).get\(''''value''''\), ''''history:'''', len\(d.get\(''''history'''',[]\)\), ''''records''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''  current:'''', d.get\(''''current''''\) is not None, ''''values:'''', len\(d.get\(''''current'''',{}\).get\(''''values'''',[]\)\)\)")

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage'); branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); bar_len=10; filled=$((used * bar_len / 100)); empty=$((bar_len - filled)); bar=$(printf '%*s' "$filled" '' | tr ' ' '█')$(printf '%*s' "$empty" '' | tr ' ' '░'); echo "$model | [$bar] ${used}% | $cwd |  $branch"
